title: stachys dregeana
intro: Stachys dregeana, also known as the White Stachys or White Betonique, is a perennial herb native to South Africa, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and wounds. The health benefits of Stachys dregeana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In traditional medicine, Stachys dregeana is often prepared as an infusion or tincture, and its herbal preparations are also used in the form of creams and ointments to treat skin conditions and wounds.
